title: CEL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Grade Officers Posts
short_info: Central Electronics (CEL) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 3 E1 Grade Officers Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 30-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: +5 years; OBC(NCL): +3 years; PwBD-General: +10 years; PwBD-OBC: +13 years; PwBD-SC/ST: +15 years; J&K domiciled (1980-1989): +5 years. Maximum age: 55 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with minimum 55% marks + Professional qualification, Minimum 2 years post-qualification experience
qualification.details: Accounts Officer: Graduate in Commerce + CA/ICWA final passed OR MBA Finance (min 55% marks), Minimum 2 years post-qualification experience in MIS, P&L, Balance Sheet, ERP system. Purchase Officer (MMD): Graduate + MBA/PGDM/PGP in Supply Chain/Materials Management (55%) OR B.E./B.Tech (55%, preference MBA SCM/MM), Min 2 years exp in procurement/stores/inventory/tendering, e-procurement/ERP knowledge. Company Secretary: Graduate (55%) + Associate Company Secretary (ICSI), Min 2 years post-qualification experience (preference Law degree).

selection_process: Written Examination Personal Interview Document Verification Pre-employment Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CEL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.celindia.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CEL E1 Grade Officers posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Central Electronics E1 Grade Officers recruitment is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the E1 Grade Officers posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree with a minimum of 55% marks along with a professional qualification. Additionally, a minimum of 2 years of post-qualification experience is mandatory for all posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the E1 Grade Officers posts is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for E1 Grade Officers at CEL?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for E1 Grade Officers posts at Central Electronics (CEL). These are distributed among different specialized roles.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the E1 Grade Officers positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the E1 Grade Officers positions will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 1,40,000 per month, as per the company's policy.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for CEL E1 Grade Officers recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for CEL E1 Grade Officers?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Examination, followed by a Personal Interview. Document Verification and Pre-employment Medical Examination are also part of the process.

faq.question: Q9. Which city is the location for these job openings?
faq.answer: The job location for these positions is Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 201010.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Central Electronics (CEL), which is www.celindia.co.in. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
